svg.title: Full technology stack — what we use and why
svg.desc: Every tool in the AI SDLC Assistant stack grouped by layer, showing tool name, purpose, and tier (free or paid).

g.text: Permanent REST + SSE layer · /api/* users · /admin/* admins · same container · never changes on migration
Type-safe state objects passed between agents
Traces every LLM call · RAG step · agent decision

svg.text: Teams MCP needs Azure AD app registration (free). Everything else needs no paid account except OpenAI embeddings (~$0.02/1M tokens).
